message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title usecase16 考试成绩复查

actor "GUI" as gui
participant "Login" as login
participant "ScoreReviewApply" as scoreReviewApply

gui -> login : create(用户)
activate login
gui -> scoreReviewApply : 成绩复查申请结果(复查结果)
activate scoreReviewApply
gui -> login : delete（用户）
deactivate login
deactivate scoreReviewApply

note left of gui: 登录系统（账号，密码）
note left of gui: 复查成绩（ScoreReviewApply）
note left of gui: 离开系统（）

@enduml
```
